content.body:
Removes DefaultProfile from UserConfig (kept as omitempty for legacy read).
Load() now scrubs default_profile and back-fills communication.mode=concise
for pre-v0.8 configs. migrateFromLegacy infers caveman mode from legacy
user.mode=caveman. Tests updated: removed DefaultProfile assertions, added
TestLegacyConfigWithDefaultProfile and TestLegacyConfigCavemanModePreserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(config): drop DefaultProfile, add communication.mode back-fill on load
